MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Georgette Brown.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kevin Funchess , is present.
Attorney, Amanda Holder-Robinson, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207 , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-24-2010 is vacated.
